creator: t-matubara@miracle.ocn.ne.jp
text:
bug in ports/deskutils/cairo-dock-plugins (2.3.0~3_2)

The icon effect is white and is displayed. 
Please correct. 

For example, it is the following png file. 
plug-ins/Animated-icons
  halo.png
  icon-rotation.png
  icon-wave.png
  icon.svg
  preview.jpg
  ray.png
  spot.png

plug-ins/icon-effect
  icon-fire.svg
  icon-firework.png
  icon-storm.png
  icon.png
  preview.jpg
  rain.png
  snow.png
  star.png

Best regards.

Fix: 

It changes for a normal png file.
How-To-Repeat: all ways.
